---
title: "data-cleaning"
output: html_document
---
# load packages
```{r}
if (!require("pacman")) install.packages("pacman")
pacman::p_load(tidyverse, ggplot2, dplyr, lubridate)
```

# load data
```{r}
data <- read_csv("../data/output/combined_hcris_mcaid.csv")
data <- data %>% 
  mutate(
    uncomp_care = tot_uncomp_care_charges + tot_uncomp_care_partial_pmts - bad_debt
  ) %>% 
  filter(!is.na(uncomp_care)) %>%
  filter(uncomp_care >0, !is.na(expanded))
  
  
```

# isolate 2014 adopters and never adopters and add post/treat variables
```{r}
reg_dat_2014 <- data %>% 
  filter(expanded == 0 | date_adopted <= ymd("2014-12-31")) %>% 
  mutate(
    post = (year >=2014),
    treat = post * expanded)
  
```
